grades.expectation: Response provides a structured checklist of pre-exchange items
grades.reason: Clear Stage B Pre-Exchange checklist with organized bullet points for buyer and seller sides

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific protocol stages or sections
grades.reason: Explicitly references Stage B (Pre-Exchange), Stage C (Exchange), General obligations, and specific paragraph numbers throughout

grades.expectation: Response covers key items: searches currency, mortgage offer, deposit, insurance, signed contracts
grades.reason: Covers all key items: searches (Stage B para 11), mortgage offer (Stage B para 12), deposit (Stage B para 9), insurance (Stage C para 8), signed contracts (Stage B para 8)

grades.expectation: Response references the protocol as source (not just general best practice)
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'Law Society protocol', mentions 'Protocol-compliant', cites specific protocol stages and paragraph numbers, and notes to defer to latest published Protocol
